summary: Tested password visibility toggle and delete user functionality. Password visibility toggle is implemented in admin user details page (for viewing stored passwords), but NOT on login/signup pages. Delete user button works correctly with email confirmation. All existing admin features remain functional.

design_issues.issue: Password visibility toggle (eye icon) is NOT implemented on login or signup pages. Users cannot see their password as they type.
design_issues.note: The review request mentions 'Password visibility toggle with eye icon (hidden by default, click to reveal)' but doesn't specify WHERE. Currently only implemented in admin user details page for viewing stored passwords. Common UX pattern is to have this on login/signup forms.

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API - All 17 tests passed (100% success rate)
✅ Password visibility toggle in Admin User Details page - Password hidden by default (dots), eye icon reveals/hides password
✅ Delete user button - Red button with trash icon in user details header
✅ Delete confirmation dialog - Requires typing user email, shows PERMANENT DELETE warning, lists all data to be deleted
✅ Backend stores plain text passwords (password_plain field) for admin visibility
✅ User registration stores plain text password correctly
✅ All admin features accessible: Overview, Users, KYC Queue, Accounts, Card Requests, Transfers Queue, Support Tickets
✅ Only SUPER_ADMIN can delete users (enforced in backend)
✅ Cannot delete admin accounts or own account (enforced in backend)
✅ Delete operation removes all associated data: accounts, transactions, KYC, tickets, cards, transfers, sessions

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (Password toggle works in admin page, but missing on login/signup pages)

action_item_for_main_agent: CLARIFICATION NEEDED: The review request mentions 'Password visibility toggle with eye icon' but doesn't specify WHERE it should be implemented. Currently implemented in admin user details page (for admins to view stored passwords). Should it also be on login/signup pages for users to see their password as they type? This is a common UX pattern. If yes, need to add eye icon toggle to LoginPage (lines 492-500) and SignupPage (lines 299-310, 312-322) password fields.
